positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a mountain range meeting a crescent moon under a deep indigo sky. The composition is highly symmetrical with the central peak dominating the frame. Use strong linework, negative space, and a limited color palette of teal, burnt orange, and cream. The style should evoke a modern bohemian/geometric look, suitable for a wearable tee print. Crisp vector lines, high contrast, graphic design poster art, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grayscale, photorealistic, realistic lighting
